title: Eddie Wang Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Eddie Wang Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Eddie Wang
Khoury Alumni
MS in Computer Science ’18
Seattle campus
For Eddie Wang, instant feedback is key. As a mechanical engineer, long project cycles made it tough to receive feedback on his work, but his satisfaction was met when he started coding software. Now, through the Align program, he’s completed impactful internships at Meta, Amazon, and SAP Concur, allowing him to transition into tech with ease.
The Align [network] is a very good resource while you are looking for different jobs. … Don’t be afraid of new things, and you will be more and more confident in future jobs
Eddie Wang, Align MSCS ’18
Explore all Khoury stories
